name_en: !!️【Complete Original Packaging】!!️MiuMiu New Mini MiuWander Handbag, featuring imported lambskin with classic brand signature Matelasse embroidery, vintage matte hardware. Utilizing curved lines, it retains a playful feel. The structured shape is full of personality, sweet yet chic, and spacious. Fashion influencers almost all own one.
name_cn:

Utilizing curved lines, it retains a playful feel. The structured shape is full of personality, sweet yet chic, and spacious. Fashion influencers almost all own one.
